title: Can't Feel My Face
why_this_song: Can't Feel My Face by The Weeknd (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: She told me, "Don't worry about it"

We both know we can't go without it

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: This I know, yeah, this I know
We both know we can't go without it
She told me, "Don't worry no more"

exercises.prompt_en: "Can't Feel My Face" was released in 2015. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Can't Feel My Face" foi lançada em 2015. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Can't Feel My Face" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Can't Feel My Face" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Weeknd one question about "Can't Feel My Face", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Weeknd sobre "Can't Feel My Face", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Can't Feel My Face" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Can't Feel My Face" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Can't Feel My Face" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Can't Feel My Face" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Can't Feel My Face" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Can't Feel My Face", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Can't Feel My Face" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Can't Feel My Face" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Can't Feel My Face" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Can't Feel My Face" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
